accommodations.text: Allow scheduled sensory breaks of up to five minutes.
accommodations.source_quote: scheduled sensory breaks of up to five minutes

accommodations.text: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.
accommodations.source_quote: do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work

accommodations.text: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.
Provide 50% extended time on reading-heavy assessments.
Check the daily planner for recorded homework before dismissal.
accommodations.source_quote: check the daily planner before dismissal

accommodations.text: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.
accommodations.source_quote: no unplanned oral responses in front of the class

accommodations.text: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.
accommodations.source_quote: break multi-step directions into numbered steps

accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items in reading and history.
accommodations.source_quote: provide a word bank for written-response items

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction mathematics 30 minutes 5 times weekly

goals.text: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.
goals.baseline: Joins a peer activity with adult prompting in 1 of 4 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: use a taught script to join a peer activity

goals.text: Given a grade-level text, Aanya will identify the main idea and two supporting details with 80% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Identifies the main idea with 40% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: identify the main idea and two supporting details with 80% accuracy

goals.text: Oscar will use a checklist to organize materials for each class in 8 of 10 days.
goals.source_quote: use a checklist to organize materials for each class

goals.text: Layla will define grade-level academic vocabulary with 80% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: define grade-level academic vocabulary with 80% accuracy

goals.text: Emma will request clarification when she misses information in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: request clarification when she misses information
